overview.short: Frang-Mai-Dam or Moidam for short (Ahom:𑜉𑜩𑜓𑜝𑜪; meaning: Burial of the dead) is a traditional tumulus of the Ahom religion.
overview.description: Frang-Mai-Dam or Moidam for short (Ahom:𑜉𑜩𑜓𑜝𑜪; meaning: Burial of the dead) is a traditional tumulus of the Ahom religion. The royal maidams of Charaideo are listed as UNESCO world heritage site. Today, the people of the four clans namely Mo-Hung, Mo-Cham, Chaodang and Mo-Plong follow the tomb tradition of Ahom religion. Structurally, a maidam consists of vaults with one or more chambers.

topPlaces.name: Charaideo
topPlaces.description: Charaideo or Che-Rai-Doi (Literally: the shining city on the hills in Ahom language) is a historic town situated in Charaideo district, Assam, India. Charaideo was established by the first Ahom king Chao Lung Siu-Ka-Pha in the year 1253 CE as the first capital of the Ahom kingdom.

items.note: Charaideo or Che-Rai-Doi (Literally: the shining city on the hills in Ahom language) is a historic town situated in Charaideo district, Assam, India. Charaideo was established by the first Ahom king Chao Lung Siu-Ka-Pha in the year 1253 CE as the first capital of the Ahom kingdom.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Maidam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Maidam is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

The nearest airport is Dibrugarh Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (162 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Maidam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Maidam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Maidam?
faq.a: Stays in Maidam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
